user.title: Energy Account
user.description: Select your electricity provider and enter your email address. A verification code will be sent to your email.

otp.title: Verification
otp.description: A verification code has been sent to **{email}**. Enter the 6-digit code from the email below.

select_account.title: Select Account
select_account.description: Multiple accounts were found. Please select the account to configure.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your {brand} session has expired. Press Submit to send a new verification code to **{email}**.

reauth_otp.title: Re-authenticate — Verification
reauth_otp.description: Enter the verification code from the email sent to **{email}**.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Account
reconfigure.description: Change the email address, provider, or account for this integration. A new verification code will be sent.

reconfigure_otp.title: Reconfigure — Verification
reconfigure_otp.description: A verification code has been sent to **{email}**. Enter the code below.

reconfigure_select_account.title: Reconfigure — Select Account
reconfigure_select_account.description: Multiple accounts were found. Select the account to use.

error.invalid_otp: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
error.email_not_found: No account found for this email address.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the provider. Please try again later.
error.account_not_found: Could not find an electricity account. Please check your email address.

stale_usage_data.title: {sensor_name}: Usage data is stale
stale_usage_data.description: The latest usage data from {sensor_name} is {hours_ago} hours old. This may indicate an issue with the provider's API. The integration will continue retrying automatically. If this persists, try using the **Backfill** service to re-fetch recent data.

v1_migration_required.title: Re-authentication required after upgrade
v1_migration_required.description: The Meridian Energy integration has been upgraded from v1 to v2, which uses a new authentication method. Please remove and re-add the integration to authenticate with the new OTP (email verification code) flow.
